docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BABAH, HIKMATULLAH AS TO DEFENDANT NAN, LI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-25-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-23-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2020 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/27/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARAD."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NAN, LI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $103.90 SERVED FEB-05-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NAN, LI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HIKMATULLAH BABAH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LI NAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BABAH, HIKMATULLAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAN, LI $6,737.00 PRINCIPAL, $178.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,915.90, ** SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION ** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
